motifs.name: earth_mark
motifs.description: Simple mark connecting to the earth

motifs.name: blowpipe
motifs.description: Long thin pattern representing the Mani blowpipe used for hunting small game in the rainforest

motifs.name: hornbill
motifs.description: Hornbill bird pattern, an important forest species in Mani territory and spiritual symbolism

motifs.name: tuber_dig
motifs.description: Root and tuber pattern reflecting the Mani practice of digging wild yams and tubers for food

motifs.name: campfire_circle
motifs.description: Circle representing the temporary campfire at a Mani forest campsite, moved frequently with nomadic life

motifs.name: rainfall_drop
motifs.description: Vertical raindrop pattern reflecting the heavy monsoon rain of the southern Thai rainforest

motifs.name: monkey_track
motifs.description: Small paw print pattern from tracking gibbons and macaques in the Mani hunting tradition
